revision.text:
[[ja:鎮守府八幡宮]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Chinjufu Hachimangū | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image needed|cat=Ōshū|qq=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|39|11|4.2|N|141|8|14.1|E|qq=}}|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|en|Iwate Prefecture|qid=Q48326|lt=Iwate Prefecture|1=Iwate Prefecture}}{{ill|Ōshū, Iwate|en|Ōshū, Iwate|qid=Q386052|lt=Ōshū|1=Ōshū, Iwate}} Mizusawa Sakura Kawamiya no Uchi 12 |LatDeg =39 |LatMin =11 |LatSec =04.2 |LongDeg =141 |LongMin =08 |LongSec =14.1 |Deities = {{ill|Hachiman Ōkami|ja|八幡大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Ōkami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q261637}}
・{{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|應神天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} (Homuda Wake no Mikoto)
・{{ill|Empress Jingū|en|Empress Jingū|qid=Q232803|lt=Empress Jingū|1=Empress Jingū}} (Okinaga Tarashihime no Mikoto)
・{{ill|Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|ja|市杵島姫命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} |Sacred object = |Shrine Rank = Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |Establishment = {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 20 ({{ill|801|en|801|qid=Q30008|lt=801|1=801}}) |Main hall = |Alternate name = |Pilgrimage = |festival = September 15 |Sacred rites = |Map=Japan Iwate |location = {{ill|Oshu|qid=Q386052|1=Ōshū, Iwate}} |coordinates = {{Coord|39.1845|N|141.13725|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Chinjufu Hachimangū''' (鎮守府八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Ōshū, Iwate|en|Ōshū, Iwate|qid=Q386052|lt=Ōshū|1=Ōshū, Iwate}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|en|Iwate Prefecture|qid=Q48326|lt=Iwate Prefecture|1=Iwate Prefecture}}, Mizusawa. Its former Rank was {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. == History == The {{ill|Azuma Kagami|en|Azuma Kagami|qid=Q1042324|lt=Azuma Kagami|1=Azuma Kagami}} records that {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} visited the Hachiman Shrine located in the {{ill|Chinjufu (ancient Japan)|ja|鎮守府 (古代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinjufu (ancient Japan)|1=Chinjufu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11651160}} of {{ill|Isawa District, Iwate|en|Isawa District, Iwate|qid=Q1131876|lt=Isawa District|1=Isawa District, Iwate}}.Entry for Bunji 5 in the Azuma Kagami The shrine's origin story claims that it was established when the {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|qid=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} led an expedition against the eastern tribes. Tamuramaro's bow, arrows, and whip are said to have been stored in the shrine's treasure house. This account notes that the Hachiman deity revered by the Kamakura clan was enshrined in Isawa District's Chinjufu before the establishment of Hachiman shrines in {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|qid=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}}.{{Sfn|Abe Mikio|2004|pages=73-74|qq=}}. In {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=Taisho 10|1=1922}}, the shrine was designated a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. == Access == From {{ill|Mizusawa Station|en|Mizusawa Station|qid=Q899669|lt=Mizusawa Station|1=Mizusawa Station}} on {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=East Japan Railway Company|1=East Japan Railway Company}}, take the {{ill|Iwateken Kōtsū|ja|岩手県交通|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwateken Kōtsū|1=Iwateken Kotsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11474655}} "National Highway North Line" bus toward the {{ill|Kenmin Driving License Center|ja|県南運転免許センター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmin Driving License Center|1=Ken'nan Driving License Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11582635}}. Alight at "Hachiman Shrine-mae" and walk for 5 minutes. == Notes == {{footnotes help|qq=}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="note"|qq=}} === References === {{Reflist|qq=}} == Further reading == * {{Cite book|lang=ja|author=Abe Mikio|authorlink=Abe Mikio|title=Tōhoku no Tamura-gatari|publisher=Sanmyaku Shoten|series=Sanmyaku Folklore Series|date=2004-1|isbn=4-8382-9063-2|ref=harv|qq=}} == See Also == * {{ill|Usa Hachimangū|ja|宇佐八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa Hachimangū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇佐神宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇佐神宮|1=Usa Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q715632}} * {{ill|Ōsaki Hachimangū|en|Ōsaki Hachimangū|qid=Q874428|lt=Ōsaki Hachimangū|1=Ōsaki Hachimangū}} == External links == * [http://chinjufu.jp/ Chinjufu Hachimangū] (Official Website) {{Shinto-stub|qq=}} {{Prefecture-substub|pref=Iwate Prefecture|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|鎮守府八幡宮|version=101921605|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鎮守府八幡宮]] {{wikidata link|Q38276245}} [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Ōshū, Iwate]] [[Category:奥州市の歴史]] [[Category:奥州市の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Iwate Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Iwate Prefecture]] [[Category:Tamura storytelling]]
